hero.title: Building the Future of Global Commerce.
hero.subtitle: Trivoxa Group is an international business group delivering trusted products, strategic sourcing solutions, and professional services across global markets. We connect businesses with opportunities, simplify international trade, and build partnerships designed for long-term success.

about.heading: A Vision Beyond Business.
about.p1: Trivoxa Group was founded with a long-term vision: to build an organization that creates lasting value through international trade, innovation, and strategic partnerships.
about.p2: Today, we operate through global sourcing, product exports, and professional services. Tomorrow, we will continue expanding into new industries, new markets, and new opportunities while remaining committed to trust, quality, and excellence.
about.p3: We believe meaningful businesses are not measured only by revenue, but by the value they create, the relationships they build, and the impact they leave behind.

values.curiosityDesc: We stay curious about markets, industries, and better ways to build.
values.integrityDesc: Trust is earned through honesty, transparency, and consistency.
values.innovationDesc: We embrace new ideas, technology, and continuous improvement.
values.growthDesc: We create space for ambitious people to grow with the company.

careers.heading: Build What's Next With Us
careers.p1: Every great organization is built by people who believe in creating something larger than themselves.
careers.p2: At Trivoxa, we're building a culture driven by curiosity, integrity, innovation, and continuous growth—where ambitious people come together to create meaningful impact across global industries.

finalCta.heading: The Next Great Partnership Starts Here.
finalCta.lead: Whether you're looking to source products, expand into new markets, or collaborate on innovative solutions, Trivoxa Group is ready to help you move forward with confidence.

trust.heading: Built on Experience. Focused on Partnership.
trust.p1Body: Built upon the manufacturing expertise of our parent company, Shiveshwar Textiles — decades of production knowledge that inform every sourcing decision and quality standard we uphold.
trust.p2Body: Every project is guided by structured quality coordination — from production specifications through final delivery — with documentation and transparency at every stage.
trust.p3Body: From export documentation and logistics coordination to international compliance, we manage the complexity of cross-border commerce so our partners can focus on their business.
trust.p4Body: We believe sustainable success is achieved through lasting relationships rather than one-time transactions. Our approach is designed to create value that compounds over years, not just shipments.

globalPresence.heading: Connecting Opportunities Across Borders
globalPresence.lead: International business is built on trust, collaboration, and strong relationships. Through an expanding network of suppliers, partners, and clients, Trivoxa Group is building meaningful connections that enable organizations to grow confidently across international markets.
globalPresence.disclaimer: Illustrative trade corridors — representative of the lanes Trivoxa operates, not live shipment tracking.
globalPresence.quote: Quality standards don't change with the destination. Every product, every shipment, every partnership carries the same commitment to excellence.

industries.heading: Supporting the Industries That Shape Tomorrow
industries.descBuilding: Natural stone, marble, granite & construction materials.
industries.descAgri: Sourced produce, spices, dry fruits & processed foods.
industries.descTechnology: Software, AI & digital transformation for modern business.

businessArms.arm1Thesis: Connecting global businesses with trusted manufacturing partners to deliver quality products through dependable sourcing and export solutions across multiple industries.
businessArms.arm2Thesis: A dedicated technology services arm delivering software, AI, branding, and digital marketing — helping businesses build, grow, and modernize.
